auth.label: Bearer Token
auth.description: Callingly bearer token used with the Authorization header. Create it under Settings > API Keys in the Callingly dashboard: https://callingly.com/dashboard/settings/api_keys

actions.name: create_call
actions.description: Create a Callingly call from lead details and routing information.

account_id.description: Agency account identifier used when acting on behalf of a client account.

first_name.description: Lead first name to use for the call.

last_name.description: Lead last name to use for the call.

phone_number.description: Lead phone number for the call.

email.description: Lead email address for the call.

crm_id.description: CRM identifier passed through to Callingly.

scheduled_at.description: Optional scheduled timestamp for the call.

inputSchema.description: Body fields for creating a Callingly call.
